name: tomorrow is my birthday
short_description: "we don't have to do this. why don't we just leave?" asks you your bestfriend while you try to escape your hometown. and you start hating them. and you start hating yourself. can you pull through or will you choose to go home again? both decisions feel wrong but this time it's you who has to choose.
detailed_description:
There's a certain kind of coolness haunting this summer. And two friends want to run away from it. Get to know Petal, Bios and their summery secret.

The words you choose to say during this journey will decide its ending. Watch all the flowers closely. Breathe in the humid colors around you. Catch the essence of Petal and Bios' relationship. To escape this skewed reality. And become a person.

A denpa Point-and-Click-Adventure about becoming a person, giving up, and a doomed friendship. Don't forget that you always can go home again. But you can also dare to answer this question truthfully: "we don't have to do this. why don't we just leave?", while you walk through Petal and Bios' hometown and interact with objects that make you remember your fears.

Featuring!

  • Over 40 photographs to explore

  • Up to 90 minutes of playtime

  • Handmade drawings and sound effects

  • Three different endings

  • Fear and Loathing

Including!

  • An OST from polygon cove

  • An Artwork from stargrrl

  • A voice from eliva
